item.title: 0.4.1 beta (build 23)
item.description:
Groovyday 0.4.1 private beta

  • New Dock Wings place artwork and playback on the left and visualizer controls on the right
  • The two wings shrink independently as the centered Dock fills, without covering its icons
  • Drag the horizon between Dock Wings and Dockscape; lift Dockscape upward to detach into Floating
  • Drag a Floating window back to the Dock edge to reconnect it to the visual continuum

This is an opt-in development build for personal testing.
